brand.name: FreshCo
brand.guidelines: Tone: confident, motivating, athletic. Use bold, high-energy visuals. Never use words: 'cheap', 'budget', 'discount'. Emphasise performance, recovery, and dedication — never mock effort or ability.

products.name: ProFlow 750 Insulated Bottle
products.description: Double-wall stainless bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours — built for training sessions, match days, and long rides

products.name: ChargeUp Electrolyte Mix — Citrus
products.description: Low-sugar hydration powder with sodium, potassium, and magnesium — mix with water for fast replenishment after sweat-heavy workouts

target_audience: Amateur and club athletes, gym-goers, and weekend runners, ages 18–45, who train regularly and care about recovery and hydration
campaign_message: Train hard. Recover smart. Stay in the game.
